examples: They had to walk across an emergency footbridge, holding onto a rope that served as a rail.
Travellers get from one side to the other by walking across a footbridge that spans a little stream.
She forgot about Mandeni coming and met him on the footbridge.
The signs on the footbridge on the A338, near Holdenhurst village, will be erected in July.
Work has begun on the construction of a "giant Meccano-style footbridge" in Greater Manchester.
